title: Platanus umbrosa
taxonomy: Platanus umbrosa is classified as a species of tree in the family Platanaceae. This family consists of only one genus, Platanus, which includes several species of plane trees. Platanus umbrosa is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as the Mediterranean plane tree. The classification of Platanus umbrosa reflects its unique characteristics and distinct position within the plant kingdom. Further classification can be broken down into order and class levels, but Platanus umbrosa is primarily recognized as a species within the family Platanaceae.
uses: Platanus umbrosa, also known as the Italian plane tree, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential benefits.
